title: Double slip seal profile for plug valves
abstract: A slip seal having a double profile provides two barriers to withstand the working pressure of a medium acting against the slip when a plug valve is in the closed position.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A seal (10) adapted for use in a slip (20) of a plug valve body, the seal comprising: . a flat surface extending an entire width and length of the seal on a slip- side of the seal; a first and a second outwardly protruding contact surface area (13, 17) on a valve body side of the seal and arranged normal to the flat surface on the slip seal side, said contact surface areas (13, 17) being spaced apart from one another by a recessed valley surface and from a respective outside edge of the seal. 2. The seal (10) according to claim 1 wherein the first and second contact surface areas (13, 17) are a rounded contact surface area. 3. The seal (10) according to claim 2 wherein the first and second contact surface areas (13, 17) form a portion of a sinusoidal-shaped seal face (11). 4. The seal (10) according to claim 1 wherein said contact surface areas (13, 17) protrude above an upper face (21) of the slip seal seat (25) when the seal is in a non-sealing position. 5. A method of sealing a plug valve, the plug valve body including a pair of slips (20) each equipped with a slip seal seat (25) containing a slip seal (10), the method comprising: forming a first and a second seal (10) to withstand working pressure of a medium acting against a respective slip (20) when the plug valve is in a closed position, the first and second seals (10) formed, respectively, by a first and a second outwardly protruding contact surface area (13, 17) spaced apart from one another on a valve body side of the slip seal and arranged normal to a flat surface on a slip side of the slip seal, each said contact surface area spaced apart from a respective side edge of the slip seal. 6. The method according to claim 5 wherein the first and second contact surface areas (13, 17) are a rounded contact surface area. 7. The method according to claim 6 wherein the first and second contact surface areas (13, 17) form a portion of a sinusoidal-shaped seal face (11). 8. The method according to claim 5 wherein said first and second contact surface areas (13, 17) protrude above an upper face (21) of a respective slip (20) when the plug valve is in an open position.
